scenes.title: Too many options. Too much confusion.
scenes.subtitle: Very little clarity for your child.
scenes.voice: Too many career options. Too much confusion. And very little clarity for your child.

scenes.title: Introducing AptiPath360
scenes.subtitle: Career Discovery for Grade 8 to Post-12.
scenes.voice: Introducing AptiPath360 by Robo Dynamics, a guided Career Discovery system for students from Grade 8 to Post 12.

scenes.title: Simple parent-first activation flow
scenes.subtitle: Register, pay, generate student link, student login.
scenes.voice: Simple parent first flow. Register, complete payment, and instantly generate your student's secure test link.

scenes.title: Adaptive student assessment experience
scenes.subtitle: MCQ, Slider, Drag-Rank. Personalized by grade, stream, and program.
scenes.voice: The student takes an adaptive assessment, personalized by grade, stream, and program, like Science, Commerce, Humanities, B.Tech, B.B.A, and more.

scenes.title: Powerful report for real decisions
scenes.subtitle: Top careers, strengths, stream-fit insights, and 90-day plan.
scenes.voice: You get a powerful report: top career matches, strengths, stream fit insights, and a practical 90 day action plan.

scenes.title: Start AptiPath360 today
scenes.subtitle: Support: +91 8374377311 (Call / WhatsApp)
scenes.voice: AptiPath360 helps families make smarter career decisions early. Start today. For support, call or WhatsApp plus nine one eight three seven four three seven seven three one one.
